description: GitHub MCP: SessionStart hint to prefer MCP tools over gh CLI

hooks.command: echo 'You have access to a GitHub MCP server. Prefer GitHub MCP tools (mcp__github__*) over the gh CLI for GitHub operations (PRs, issues, actions, code security). Use gh CLI only for operations the MCP server does not support. For raw.githubusercontent.com URLs, use the mcp__github__get_file_contents tool instead of WebFetch.'
